variants.title: HiFi Filter SG 5012 Gas Filter | Replaces the SF Filter SAO51257
variants.description: The genuine HiFi Filter SG 5012 Gas Filter is HiFi's replacement to the SF Filter SAO51257. Easy to install and replace, the SG 5012 is built to withstand demanding environments, offering long-lasting protection and reliability. Whether used in automotive, agricultural, construction, or industrial applications, this filter is an essential component for maintaining system health and performance.
